title: Telwater Pty Ltd — Regulatory action
investigation_objective: The ACCC opposed Yamaha Motor Australia's proposed acquisition of Telwater Pty Ltd (announced 18 December 2025) following an in-depth investigation, finding it likely to substantially lessen competition in the wholesale supply of outboard motors in Australia. Telwater, market leader in aluminium trailer boats (approximately 60-70% market share via its Quintrex, Stacer and Yellowfin brands), was the acquisition target; the ACCC's concern centred on the combined entity's ability to leverage that dominant position to disadvantage rival outboard motor suppliers.
scope: Named as the acquisition target in an ACCC merger opposition decision following an in-depth competition investigation; Holds an approximately 60-70% market share in aluminium trailer boats, a position the ACCC found could be leveraged anti-competitively if the acquisition proceeded; ACCC found the proposed transaction likely to substantially lessen competition in outboard motor wholesale supply
